resources.string: Parking will be saved when you exit
Tap the warnings below to grant permissions
⚠️ We need your location to save your parking spot
⚠️ Step counter needed to detect when you leave the car
⚠️ Location access all the time is needed to track parking
⚠️ Allow background activity to ensure parking is recorded
To remember where you parked, we need access to your location.\n\nDon\'t worry — we only use it to save your parking spot.
We use the step counter to know when you\'ve walked away from your car.\n\nThis helps us save the exact parking spot at the right moment.
To detect when you leave your car, the app needs location access all the time — even when the screen is off.\n\nPlease select \"Allow all the time\" on the next screen.
This app uses almost no battery.\n\nTo ensure your parking place is recorded, please allow the following request.
